creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254281
bmd-plugin-avahi.patch

Regarding #282094, the same error happens on sysutils/bmd-plugin-avahi port.
I've got the following mail from pkg-fallout@.

```
Maintainer:     naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
Log URL:        https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/package19/data/141amd64-default-build-as-user/87798939e8eb/logs/bmd-plugin-avahi-3.0.log
Build URL:      https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/package19/build.html?mastername=141amd64-default-build-as-user&build=87798939e8eb
```

Please apply the `bmd-plugin-avahi.patch`.
Probably SHAREOWN and SHAREGRP parameters are deleted by accident.
